failed_attempts:
let g (n : ℕ) := Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse
  have hg : ∀ n, 0 < n → f n = g n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    let d (m : ℕ) := Nat.digits 2 m
    have hd {m} (hm : 0 < m) : d (2 * m) = 0 :: d m := by
      rw [d, Nat.digits_add 2 (by norm_num) (by simp) (by linarith)]
      simp
    have hd1 (m) : d (2 * m + 1) = 1 :: d m := by
      rw [d, Nat.digits_add 2 (by norm_num) (by simp) (by linarith)]
      simp
    have hg_even {m} (hm : 0 < m) : g (2 * m) = g m := by
      simp [g, hd hm, Nat.ofDigits_append]
    have hg_odd (m) : g (2 * m + 1) = g m + 2 ^ (d m).length := by
      simp [g, hd1 m, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
    match n with
    | 0 => contradiction
    | 1 => simp [h₁]; native_decide
    | 2 => rw [←mul_one 2, h₃ 1 (by norm_num), h₁]; native_decide
    | 3 => simp [h₂]; native_decide
    | n =>
      if he : n % 2 = 0 then
        let m := n / 2
        have : n = 2 * m := Nat.eq_mul_of_div_eq_right (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero he) rfl
        have hm : 0 < m := Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (this ▸ hn) (by norm_num)
        rw [this, h₃ m hm, ih m (by linarith) hm, hg_even hm]
      else
        let m := n / 4
        have hm : 0 < m := Nat.div_pos (by linarith) (by norm_num)
        if h1 : n % 4 = 1 then
          have : n = 4 * m + 1 := (Nat.div_mod_unique (by norm_num)).2 ⟨rfl, h1⟩
          rw [this, h₄ m hm, ih m (by linarith) hm, ih (2*m+1) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          rw [hg_odd (2*m), hd hm, hg_odd m]
          simp [g, hd1 (2*m), hd hm, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]; ring
        else
          have h3 : n % 4 = 3 := by
             have : n % 2 = 1 := Nat.mod_eq_of_ne_zero_of_lt (by simp [he]) (by norm_num)
             omega
          have : n = 4 * m + 3 := (Nat.div_mod_unique (by norm_num)).2 ⟨rfl, h3⟩
          rw [this, h₅ m hm, ih m (by linarith) hm, ih (2*m+1) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          rw [hg_odd (2*m), hd hm, hg_odd m]
          simp [g, hd1 (2*m), hd hm, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]; ring
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n hn => by rw [hg n (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn).1])]
  native_decide
